result:
30/30 tests pass. Here's what was added:

- **`status`** — lists staged files or `(none)`
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — compares two commits, reports Added/Removed/Modified files
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores working directory files from commit, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — moves HEAD without touching working directory files
- **`rm <file>`** — removes a file from the staging index
- **`show <hash>`** — displays commit metadata + files with two-space indent

The `read-commit` function was also extended to parse the `files:` section, enabling diff/checkout/show to work correctly.
